summary: Short A/B test windows caused misleading results; new rule: minimum sample size and a 7-day window before calling a winner.

summary: Approved a monthly webinar as a lead magnet with lean gating (business email only) and clear consent language.

summary: Cold emails saw low reply rates; warm-up with content-first sequence and then targeted LinkedIn DMs improved acceptance.
notes: Record that trust-building content should precede direct asks.
